name: Llama 3.1 8B
description: Meta's flagship 8B model. Excellent all-rounder for chat, coding, and reasoning tasks. Great balance of quality and speed.

name: Llama 3.1 70B
description: Meta's large model with near-GPT-4 performance. Exceptional at complex reasoning and coding. Requires significant VRAM.

name: Llama 3.2 3B
description: Compact model that punches above its weight. Great for quick tasks on limited hardware.

name: Llama 3.2 1B
description: Ultra-lightweight model for edge devices. Runs on almost anything, suitable for simple tasks.

name: Llama 3.3 70B
description: Latest Llama 70B with improved instruction following. Top-tier open-source model.

name: Mistral 7B v0.3
description: Efficient 7B model from Mistral AI. Strong performance with sliding window attention for longer contexts.

name: Mistral Small 24B
description: Mistral's 24B model bridging the gap between 7B and large models. Excellent reasoning with moderate VRAM requirements.

name: Mixtral 8x7B
description: Mixture of Experts model — only ~13B params active per token but needs full model in memory. Strong multi-task performance.

name: Phi-4 14B
description: Microsoft's latest small-but-mighty model. Punches well above its weight class in reasoning and coding benchmarks.

name: Phi-3.5 Mini 3.8B
description: Microsoft's compact model optimized for reasoning and coding. Exceptional quality for its size.

name: Qwen 2.5 7B
description: Alibaba's versatile 7B model. Strong multilingual capabilities and coding performance.

name: Qwen 2.5 14B
description: Mid-size Qwen model with excellent reasoning. Strong contender against Llama 3.1 8B at slightly higher resource cost.

name: Qwen 2.5 32B
description: Large Qwen model rivaling 70B models in many benchmarks at half the VRAM. Excellent value.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B
description: Alibaba's flagship model. Competes with the best open-source 70B models across all tasks.

name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B
description: Specialized coding model from Alibaba. Excellent for code generation, completion, and explanation.

name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B
description: Top-tier open-source coding model. Rivals GPT-4 on many coding benchmarks.

name: DeepSeek R1 7B (Distill)
description: Distilled reasoning model from DeepSeek. Shows chain-of-thought reasoning at just 7B parameters.

name: DeepSeek R1 14B (Distill)
description: 14B distilled reasoning model. Strong mathematical and logical reasoning capabilities.

name: DeepSeek R1 32B (Distill)
description: 32B distilled reasoning model. Excellent balance of reasoning ability and resource requirements.

name: DeepSeek R1 70B (Distill)
description: Full-size 70B distilled reasoning model. Among the best open-source models for complex reasoning tasks.

name: DeepSeek V3 671B
description: Massive MoE model (~37B active). Needs enormous VRAM even quantized. Among the most capable open models.

name: Gemma 2 2B
description: Google's compact model. Surprisingly capable for its size, great for resource-constrained environments.

name: Gemma 2 9B
description: Google's mid-size model with excellent instruction following and knowledge.

name: Gemma 2 27B
description: Google's larger model. Strong reasoning and factual accuracy. Good for detailed tasks.

name: Gemma 3 12B
description: Google's latest Gemma with multimodal understanding. Excellent quality-to-size ratio.

name: Gemma 3 27B
description: Google's large Gemma 3 model. Top-tier multimodal understanding with strong text capabilities.

name: CodeLlama 7B
description: Meta's specialized code model based on Llama 2. Good at code generation and infilling.

name: CodeLlama 34B
description: Large CodeLlama for complex code tasks. Strong at multi-file code understanding.

name: StarCoder2 7B
description: BigCode's code generation model trained on The Stack v2. Supports 600+ programming languages.

name: StarCoder2 15B
description: Larger StarCoder2 with broader code knowledge. Excellent for multi-language code tasks.

name: Yi 1.5 34B
description: 01.AI's large model with strong Chinese and English capabilities. Good all-rounder at 34B scale.

name: Command R 35B
description: Cohere's RAG-optimized model. Excellent at grounded generation and tool use.

name: Qwen 2.5 0.5B
description: Tiny model for edge devices and experimentation. Runs on virtually any hardware.

name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B
description: Small but capable Qwen model. Great for quick tasks and limited hardware.

name: Qwen 2.5 3B
description: Compact Qwen model with surprisingly good capabilities for its size.

name: Internlm 2.5 7B
description: Shanghai AI Lab's versatile model. Strong at math, coding, and tool use.
